description: Validated drift events produced by the Detection Engine. Consumed by Member B's Intelligence Engine and served via GET /drifts.

drifts.suppression_reason: Event flagged maintenance_window_active=True but no valid, approved maintenance window was found — treated as unsuppressed.
drifts.narrative: At 2026-03-12T00:00:00Z, port_443_allow_scoped on Firewall (PaloAlto) was changed from False to True by A. Fernandes (human) via AddRule, outside any approved maintenance window. This aligns with MITRE ATT&CK technique T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application). Maps to NIST 800-53 SC-7. Classified as MEDIUM severity (pattern: UNKNOWN_PATTERN, score: 4.5).
remediation_steps: Manually review this change — it does not match a known drift pattern.
Consider adding a new rule to the Rule Engine if this recurs.

drifts.narrative: At 2026-03-14T02:47:11Z, enabled on CloudTrail (AWS) was changed from True to False by R. Menon (human) via UpdateTrail, outside any approved maintenance window. This aligns with MITRE ATT&CK technique T1562.008 (Disable or Modify Cloud Logs). Maps to NIST 800-53 AU-2. Classified as CRITICAL severity (pattern: LOGGING_DISABLED, score: 15.0).
remediation_steps: Re-enable the logging control immediately and verify continuous delivery to the log store.
Review the gap window for any activity that occurred while logging was off.
Confirm whether a valid change ticket/maintenance window covered this action; escalate if none exists.

drifts.narrative: At 2026-03-14T03:12:47Z, port_8080_open_to_world on EC2-SecurityGroup (AWS) was changed from False to True by R. Menon (human) via AuthorizeSecurityGroupIngress, outside any approved maintenance window. This aligns with MITRE ATT&CK technique T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application). Maps to NIST 800-53 SC-7. Classified as MEDIUM severity (pattern: FIREWALL_RULE_BROADENED, score: 7.5).
remediation_steps: Revert the firewall/security-group rule to its baseline scope.
Check external exposure (e.g. scan the opened port) to confirm no active exploitation.
If the rule is genuinely required, route it through change approval with an explicit TTL.

drifts.narrative: At 2026-03-14T03:20:02Z, agent_active on EDR (CrowdStrike) was changed from True to False by svc-key-7734 (unattributed) (unknown) via AgentTamperEvent, outside any approved maintenance window. This aligns with MITRE ATT&CK technique T1562.001 (Disable or Modify Tools). Maps to NIST 800-53 SI-4. Classified as CRITICAL severity (pattern: ENDPOINT_PROTECTION_DISABLED, score: 12.0).
remediation_steps: Verify the EDR/endpoint agent is running (not just 'installed') and restore protection.
Isolate the affected host if compromise indicators are present.
Investigate the tamper event's process tree and origin.

drifts.narrative: At 2026-03-14T03:32:19Z, storage_encrypted on RDS (AWS) was changed from True to False by R. Menon (human) via ModifyDBInstance, outside any approved maintenance window. This aligns with MITRE ATT&CK technique T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact). Maps to NIST 800-53 SC-28. Classified as CRITICAL severity (pattern: ENCRYPTION_DOWNGRADED, score: 12.0).
remediation_steps: Restore encryption to the baseline standard (e.g. AES-256 / SSE-KMS) immediately.
Identify what data was exposed at the weaker encryption level and for how long.
Audit the change pipeline/actor that introduced the downgrade to prevent recurrence.

drifts.narrative: At 2026-03-14T03:41:05Z, mfa_required on IAM (AWS) was changed from True to False by R. Menon (human) via DeactivateMFADevice, outside any approved maintenance window. This aligns with MITRE ATT&CK technique T1556 (Modify Authentication Process). Maps to NIST 800-53 IA-2. Classified as CRITICAL severity (pattern: MFA_OR_AUTH_WEAKENED, score: 12.0).
remediation_steps: Re-enforce MFA / step-up authentication on the affected identity or policy immediately.
Review recent authentication events for the affected account for signs of misuse.
Rotate credentials for the affected identity as a precaution.

drifts.narrative: At 2026-03-22T14:03:00Z, public_access_prevention on Cloud Storage (GCP) was changed from enforced to inherited by K. Osei (Contractor) (human) via UpdateBucketIAM, outside any approved maintenance window. This aligns with MITRE ATT&CK technique T1530 (Data from Cloud Storage). Maps to NIST 800-53 AC-3. Classified as HIGH severity (pattern: ACCESS_CONTROL_WEAKENED, score: 10.5).
remediation_steps: Restore restrictive access settings (block public access / least privilege) immediately.
Audit who/what accessed the resource while access controls were weakened.
Add automated drift-prevention (SCP/Policy-as-Code) to block recurrence.
